ticket.title: FIX PARTNER DROPDOWN (MEILISEARCH QUERY ON INIT)

test_cases.description: Verify partner dropdown loads correctly on page init via Meilisearch query.
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown populates with the correct list of partners immediately on page load.
test_cases.actual_result: Dropdown populated correctly with partners on init.

test_cases.description: Verify dropdown search/filter returns correct partners when typing a partner name.
test_cases.expected_result: Typing a partner name filters the list to matching partners only.
test_cases.actual_result: Search correctly filtered and returned matching partners.

test_cases.description: Verify parent company scoping is respected when populating the partner dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: Only partners under the correct parent company appear in the dropdown.
test_cases.actual_result: Dropdown correctly scoped to the parent company; no cross-company leakage.
test_cases.comments: Added mid-session as supplementary edge case.

test_cases.description: Verify available services matching correctly filters per selected partner.
test_cases.expected_result: Selecting a partner updates the available services list to match that partner's offerings.
test_cases.actual_result: Available services correctly matched and updated per selected partner.
test_cases.comments: Added mid-session as supplementary edge case.

test_cases.description: Verify dropdown behavior when no partners match the search/scoping criteria (empty state).
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown shows a clear empty/no-results state without breaking the UI.
test_cases.actual_result: Empty state displayed correctly with no errors.

test_cases.description: Verify dropdown handles special characters/partial search terms without breaking the Meilisearch query.
test_cases.expected_result: Special characters and partial terms are handled gracefully, returning relevant results or none.
test_cases.actual_result: Meilisearch query handled special characters and partial terms without errors.
